1834320.name: Good Luck, Stay Safe
1834320.description:
GOOD LUCK, STAY SAFE

Inspired by classic PC shooters, fight through hordes of undead, scavenge for supplies, buy upgrades and uncover the dark secrets that this game holds.
Created with handcrafted visuals and audio - 'Good luck, stay safe' aims to give players an experience which not only forces them into unique gameplay moments, but also challenges them, keeping the player constantly on edge and scavenging for their next opportunity to escape.



BRUTALLY RETRO, IN THE BEST WAY

Sparse checkpoints, genuine challenge and all of the best parts of retro PC gaming but with the benefits of modern systems, GLSS offers a difficult, brutal experience that will test player skill.
1834320.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
